docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,773.98 FILED BY LAM, TAMMY J LAM, CHOR PANG AS TO DEFENDANT JORDAN, MEGAN D ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS:NO ANSWER. THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAM, TAMMY J AS TO DEFENDANT JORDAN, MEGAN D
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED JUN-28-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JORDAN, MEGAN D
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT JORDAN, MEGAN D
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-29-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-17-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: CROSS-COMPLAINANT MEGAN D JORDAN IS PRESENT. CROSS-DEFENDANT TAMMY J LAM IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS REATAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: DEFENDANT'S COUNTER-CLAIM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS TAMMY J. LAM AND CHOR PANG LAM ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT MEGAN D JORDAN IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $12,499.68 FILED BY JORDAN, MEGAN D AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LAM, TAMMY J LAM, CHOR PANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-17-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF TAMMY J LAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MEGAN D JORDAN IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS REATAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT JORDAN, MEGAN D RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT LAM, TAMMY J LAM, CHOR PANG $440.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: CROSS COMPLAINANT MEGAN D JORDAN IS PRESENT. CROSS DEFENDANTS TAMMY J. LAM AND CHOR PANG LAM ARE PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAM, TAMMY J LAM, CHOR PANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JORDAN, MEGAN D THIS DECISION COVERS ALL MATTERS THROUGH THE MIDDLE OF 2025. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
